Notice
Identifier
         

There are no Planned Service Outages in effect.
Notice Status Key:
1 = Initiate
2 = Supersede
3 = Terminate

 

Planned Service Outage - Maintenance Schedule

TSP NameTSP DUNSPost DatePost Time
KERN RIVER GAS TRANSMISSION COMPANY 621617372 06/23/2026 10:52:28

StatusStart DateEnd DateLocation NameCapacity
Reduction
Location		Work to be
Performed		Estimated
Operational
Capacity Dth		Estimated
Operational
Capacity
Reduction Dth		Anticipated
Impact
to Firm
Nominations		Additional Information
 Tue 09/01/2026Thu 09/03/2026Muddy Creek Compressor StationMuddy CreekUnit #3 Engine Exchange 1,891,000 142,000NoUnits #1 and #2 will be available during the unit #3 exchange. Impact to capacity is subject to change based on flow patterns at the time of the work. Capacity will be updated for each scheduling cycle during the outage.
 Tue 09/22/2026Thu 09/24/2026Painter Compressor StationPainter PlantUnit #2 Engine Exchange 185,000 89,400NoUnit #1 will be available during the unit #2 exchange. Impact to capacity is subject to change based on flow patterns at the time of the work. Capacity will be updated for each scheduling cycle during the outage.
Customer nominations will be scheduled pursuant to Section 13 of the General Terms and Conditions of Kern River's FERC Gas Tariff.
